creator: kristinacors
caption: I used Google AI in ways you probably haven’t thought of. Watch until the end...so you can do it too! Thanks for hosting me Google! @google #travelhacks #travelvlog #travelcontentcreator #aitravelhacks #giftedbygoogle

transcription.text: Google invited me in a brand trip with 20 travel creators, and I'm still not over it. Like, seriously, if you told me a few years ago when I was burnt out working 80-hour workweeks on Wall Street and feeling completely unfulfilled that this would be my life, I wouldn't have believed you. On this trip, Google dropped some serious travel hacks that are going to give you an unfair advantage planning your summer trip, so obviously I had to bring you guys along for the inside scoop. Google started the trip off right because they had us staying in Phuket, a five-star boutique hotel that I am now obsessed with. Fun fact, Megan Thee Stallion checked in while we were there. After getting settled in, we met the Google team and the other travel creators for dinner at Elise's. Meeting everyone in person is always one of my favorite parts about brand trips. Everyone was so nice and friendly, and we had a good time at dinner. Definitely go make sure to follow my new friend. The next day, we got to the Google offices, and Google actually wanted to hear what we thought about their travel tools, which was such an honor. They also shared some top-secret news about what they were working on, and it was so cool to be one of the first creators to hear about it. After the session, we got drinks at Drift Inn by the Water, and then it was time to go shopping courtesy of Google and put what we learned about Google AI to the test. One thing about me is I like expensive things, but I prefer not to pay full price for them, and Google AI actually helped me with this when I was shopping. All I did was tell it, find me a dress that looks like it costs $1,000, but it's under $350. Something chic, and I'm open to hidden deals. Well, Google AI took me to the RealReal, which I honestly would have never thought of to go to because I always think of it as an online store, and I found this beautiful retrofit gown for $290, and it fit like a glove. I'm honestly so obsessed. Then it was time to get ready for dinner. Dinner was at this spot called Palma, and you guys, this was so beautiful. If you know me, you know I'm obsessed with flowers. They had fresh flowers everywhere, and I literally felt like I was at a wedding. At dinner, I got to hang out with Sophia, another cool travel content creator you have to follow, and the dinner was so special and just filled with magic. Seriously, thanks so much for hosting us, Google. Well, that was the end of the first full day. Follow for part two, where I tell you about the other cool travel hacks and AI tools that Google just dropped.
